data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for fast historical trend querying without heavy cross-domain joins.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for fast historical trend querying without heavy cross-domain joins. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API responses or data that confirm this functionality. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga lifecycle but do not address the necessary validation for this requirement, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of fast historical trend querying without heavy cross-domain joins.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
